name: @vaagatech/reconcile-workspace
description: Declarative Snapshot and Reconciliation Testing — open-source monorepo by VaagaTech
author: VaagaTech (https://www.vaagatech.com)

scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/auth-adapters && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/api-adapters && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/core
scripts.build:demos: npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-shared && npm run build --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-scenario-api-vs-file-rest --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-scenario-db-vs-db-sqlite --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-scenario-api-vs-db-rest --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-scenario-db-vs-api-rest --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-scenario-api-vs-file-graphql --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-scenario-api-vs-db-graphql --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-scenario-db-vs-api-graphql --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-scenario-api-vs-file-soap --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-scenario-api-vs-db-soap --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-scenario-db-vs-api-soap --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-run-all
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:demos
scripts.demo: npm run build && npm run start --workspace=@vaagatech/demo-run-all
scripts.publish:packages: npm run build:packages && npm publish --workspace=@vaagatech/reconcile --access public && npm publish --workspace=@vaagatech/auth-adapters --access public && npm publish --workspace=@vaagatech/api-adapters --access public && npm publish --workspace=@vaagatech/core --access public
